mapper.select: select distinct c.id, c.coach_name as coachName, c.avatar_url as avatarUrl, c.coach_level as coachLevel, c.intro, c.sort_no as sortNo from pt_coach c inner join pt_coach_store_rel csr on csr.coach_id = c.id inner join pt_coach_schedule sch on sch.coach_id = c.id and sch.store_id = csr.store_id and sch.is_enabled = 1 where c.status = 1 and c.deleted = 0 and csr.store_id in (select store_id from pt_product_store_rel where product_id = #{productId}) and ( not exists (select 1 from pt_product_coach_rel where product_id = #{productId}) or c.id in (select coach_id from pt_product_coach_rel where product_id = #{productId}) ) order by c.sort_no desc, c.id asc

select DATE_FORMAT(start_time,'%H:%i') as startTime, DATE_FORMAT(end_time,'%H:%i') as endTime from pt_coach_schedule where coach_id = #{coachId} and store_id = #{storeId} and weekday = #{weekday} and is_enabled = 1 order by start_time asc
select store_id from pt_product_store_rel where product_id = #{value}
select store_id from pt_coach_store_rel where coach_id = #{value}
